title: Old YT Channel Intro!
content:
This is the first youtube video I posted (with the exception of previous work I have deleted) on January 9th 2025, and it served as the intro to my youtube channel for a little while! My editing was rough and my work sounded and looked WAY better when I first made it. However, this intro has aged like milk. There is a second intro but we'll get there soon. I will be posting things on this site in order from BEFORE the websites creation as Legacy posts, since they still serve as part of my portflio. This website will simply join it all together! 

Also thinking about starting a NEW youtube channel since this once was kind of a failed experiment. Not really sure. Still have videos I am working on that are scehduled to be posted for that channel, and are MEANT to be posted for that channel too. 

Until next the next Legacy post!
